plan_under_test: Prevent legacy mark-scheme crops from including the next question when the next anchor is near the top of the following page.
expected_initial_failure: The new test should fail before implementation because the active question includes the following page that starts with the next anchor.
commands_to_run: targeted process_sample probe for input/pastpapers/9709/2020/question_papers/9709_s20_qp_51.pdf with mark scheme input/pastpapers/9709/2020/mark_schemes/9709_s20_ms_51.pdf
what_passing_proves: A next-anchor-only following page is excluded from the active legacy mark-scheme block.
The focused real-PDF probe no longer produces the S20 P51 q6/q7 contaminated crop.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove every valid continuation page is preserved.
It does not prove a full 2008-2021 corpus rebuild is clean.
risk_of_bad_tests: The skip heuristic could be overfit to near-top anchors; the regression must stay paired with broad question-detection tests.

new_tests.purpose: Proves a next-anchor-only page is not included in the active legacy answer block.

commands: targeted process_sample probe for input/pastpapers/9709/2020/question_papers/9709_s20_qp_51.pdf with mark scheme input/pastpapers/9709/2020/mark_schemes/9709_s20_ms_51.pdf
success_criteria: Combined image-rendering and question-detection tests pass.
The S20 P51 q6 mark-scheme PNG is no longer a multi-question tall crop.
